message:
fix: increase MRID hash from 6 to 10 hex characters to avoid collisions (gt-0a9vy)

6 hex chars (16^6 = ~16.7M values) had birthday paradox collision risk
of ~1% at just 577 IDs per prefix namespace. 10 hex chars (40 bits,
~1.1T values) pushes that threshold to ~150K IDs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
